bororo: Paje Maria Pedrosa:
Ia boe keje, adugo buke etaregodure puae.
Buke jemarunure tugérogu bogai.
Adugo jamedu, icare etaregodure puae.

Buke roiwakare pudabo. Adugo ure tuboredo ji ca makore ji: U! Akaregodure mato, mato amugudo tu woe itabo. Icare adugo ure tumugudo tu buke apo. Buke akore: amugudo woe itogi boe, woe itogi amumode tu woe.
Paekuwo pudogi oino, adugo akore uie.
Ure tumugudo toro buke oino togi akore: aké boire ai, imi jamedu iké boire i jamedu. Kode parowo oino, pabegodumode icá pagaiwo mode pu peto.
Boe rá meture pé tadawure umode tumeduia ko.
Oino paromode, icare adugo akore: U, u boe jokodu oinono rugado oino paromode.
Oino icá, buke akore: Cá pawo paeku mi. Pawo paeku mi.
Icare adugo ure tuioko mi, tuioko bu puwogeje tu.
Ure tubewudo pudui, ure tubewudo pudui, cá pegodure.
Buke jamedu pegodure jamedu. Ure tuioko jado aaa aiwore adugo pegodure icá tugera raido jiii toro kuda tugerago nowu adugo upeji tumugudu tu tuguda.

Icá etaiwore tuguda oh oh.
Oinore kumodogere adugo pé toda.

Icá adugo kiarigodure.
Icá buke akore: imodukare akowuje, iroiwamodukare ai.
Mare imode aeku tá.
Adugo akore: ui.
Icá buke ure tuginogi tugu jokuto ure awu joku tá, ure awu metuia tá toku je.
Icare adugo ragudure akore iaa, iaa, iaa.
Tudu tabo.
Buke jamedu uture jamedu,
Icá adugo ragudure tugodui jorudukare boeji pugeje. Joku bokware.
Icá makore boe jamedu boe, awu kiogo, awu barege kugure boe ewo tugera bararedo pudui tuioko bokware kodi.
Icá, icare aregodure kuo ae, kuo.
Icá makore kuoji.
Akore: imeduia nure aki, imeduia nure aki akera bararedo i, ioku bokware ah icá.
Kuo akore: u boe jokodu, boe jokodu inuba boere kaboba inuba boere ai pugeje kodiba aeku bokware oino.
Icare adugo akore: ohh buke ure ioku tá dukodire ioku bokware kodire iedure boeji doi doi doi oino kodire inagoi oino boewo ia, boewo tugera bararedo i.
Icare kuo akore: u amugudo tuguda tu nono iemarumode ia aeku bogai, ia woe.
Icá, nono icare uture kodure jii bokwado i paru kae.
Icá nowu bokwado i, aiwore ji, aiwore ji ahh urugado.
Aiwore iji ahh woe rugado. Icá tuwurerogu tugu mototo jawu.
Icá jorudure nowu ia bokwado i kuruji.
DuBoe egore bokwadobe oino ji.
Icare ure tugerago ji, tuwurerogu reko ji, kugaru tá piji, icá aiwore ji ahh urugado ure mugudo tu.
Icá jemarure metuia bogai pugeje.
Tuwure tugu mototo jice woje, icá jorudure iaji pugeje.
Aiwore jice icá awurogu kodure, ure pobe.
Icare uture adugo bogai, icare aregodure ae.
Icá ure nowu joku jado oino, icá ure nowu bokwadobe tugu karai jokuto, ure awu metuia jado pugeje ure awu metuia tugu karai jokuto.
Icare akore: Icá aeku jado.
Icá adugo ure tuioku jado icá nono jorudure boeji. Aiwo pemegare pugeje. Icare jekarere.
Dukeje makore kuoji akore: ia amureworogu keje awiapagamode tu amearudumode iwurea akoji tu akagodo “ Okwakuo “ “ Okwakuo “ oino, oinore akagomode.
Du ioruduiwamode amugure nono duji, imode boe pado baii oino akoiei.
Ikera iwure jokawo awugeje.

Icá nowu adugo uture mare icá joku pemegare aiwore tubiji, ure tuimaedu icá uture.
Kodo jii icare aregodure ia boekumeki kae.
Aiwore tu icá  jorudure cowu bukeji jice pugeje.
Icá akore: icá imode akowuje oino icare imode akowuje.
Icá ure tubodudo ji bakuru jore oino mato buke joruduwakare adugo koduie mato pudai duji.
Icá bakuru jore oino woje pugeje, icare ure tudugodure icare aiwore tu tuibagi oino ah adugo puredugodure ae, icare rekodure, rekodure, rekodure adugo kodure kodaji uture tabo.
Icare roiwakare pudabo pugeje, icare aregodure ia koiwo paru kae, nowu koiwo kurire.

unure tuwiado toro nowu poroto toro tubagudu koia adugoce.
